title: assertpmux pass generates wrong assertions for priority case

features.name: priority case with expression case item matching specific value
features.description: Code should include a priority case statement with an expression case item that matches a specific value (foo == 3), combined with a bit-select case item (foo[0]) and a default clause

features.name: priority case without default and missing case items
features.description: Code should include a priority case statement without a default clause, where case item values (1 and 2) do not cover all possible values of the case expression (foo[1:0] can be 0, 1, 2, or 3)

features.name: assume property constraint for formal verification
features.description: Code should include an assume property directive used to constrain formal verification, asserting that a 2-bit signal equals a specific value
